Class SBMLReaction

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml.SBMLReaction
public class SBMLReaction extends Object
Represents a reaction in an SBML model.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
